title: The molecular characterization of soil nematode communities is hampered by the lack of an optimized DNA extraction method
author: Waeyenberge, Lieven
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Adoption of new management practices to increase crop production and quality. 
 The molecular characterization of soil nematode communities is hampered by the lack of an optimized DNA extraction method. 
 This work was funded by the European Commission Horizon 2020 project SoildiverAgro [grant agreement 817819].
steps_raw:
Adoption of new management practices to increase crop production and quality. 
 The molecular characterization of soil nematode communities is hampered by the lack of an optimized DNA extraction method. 
 This work was funded by the European Commission Horizon 2020 project SoildiverAgro [grant agreement 817819].
